description_long: This object consists of three pieces of sushi arranged side by side. Two of the pieces are classic onigiri, featuring a triangular mound of white rice partially wrapped in a dark, matte nori seaweed sheet, with one piece showing a small brown topping or filling at its apex. The third piece is a round, golden-brown ball, likely a fried or baked rice ball, with a slightly rough and uneven surface. The nori on the onigiri appears slightly wrinkled and textured, contrasting with the smooth, sticky rice. The overall appearance suggests a hand-formed, artisanal preparation, with visible variations in shape and surface. The sushi pieces are unadorned except for the single topping on one onigiri, and there is no visible packaging or serving plate.
description: Three pieces of sushi: two triangular onigiri with nori and one round, golden-brown rice ball, all with a hand-formed, textured appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two triangular onigiri with nori and a small topping on the leftmost piece, plus the round, golden-brown rice ball on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the sushi, with the round rice ball at the front and the two onigiri lined up behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the round rice ball and the nori-wrapped backs of the two onigiri.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the round rice ball at the back and the two onigiri in front, with visible nori and rice textures.
